page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A sparsity-based consensus algorithm for long erroneous sequencing reads.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Apache Spark based Read Clustering tool to cluster a large number of DNA/RNA sequences generated from next-generation sequence technologies, including Illumina and PacBio.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Apache Spark based Read Clustering tool to cluster a large number of DNA/RNA sequences generated from next-generation sequence technologies, including Illumina and PacBio.
